creator: conrads@cox.net
text:
I've done some extensive code review and revisions over 
		the last several days, and I can now say with confidence 
		that *this* will be the final version of this package.

		Went over the code very carefully, reorganized it, 
		corrected a few things I had neglected to take care of 
		earlier, fixed a few minor bugs/inaccuracies, and made 
		every effort to boost its robustness *and* correctness.

		All is as it should be now, and no further revisions 
		will be forthcoming.  I'm now satisfied that the program 
		has been brought along as far as it needed to go.  This 
		*is* the final version.

		"This time for sure!", as Bullwinkle used to say.  :-)

Fix: patch below
How-To-Repeat: 		N/A
